free_text: Spectra and inelastic scattering cross-sections of
neutrons in the 0.2-1.2 MeV energy range scattered by
nuclei of U, Th, Hg, W, Sb, Cd, Mo, Nb, Fe
Of compiler. There are misprints in the title in
At.Energy and it's Engl.translation in Sov.At.Energy:
V -> U ( there are U data, but no Vanadium data)
Neutron spectra were measured with and without
.Natural composition samples in the form of spherical
layers of 30 mm thickness (inner diameter 40 mm, outer
diameter 100 mm). Samples were prepared of oxide's
powder placed in stainless-steel containers 0.2 mm
Neutron source - sample distance was 350 mm.
errors in transport cross sections (~15-20%) used
For energy dependence of He-3 chamber detection
Some SUBENTs deleted due to the data
M.M. Subent 008 data units were corrected.
Correction for current rules and dictionaries.
Later publication for Fe-56 partial CS
